profile.name: notebooklm-mcp-cli

intro.title: NotebookLM CLI & MCP Server
intro.desc: Programmatic access to Google NotebookLM** — via command-line interface (CLI) or Model Context Protocol (MCP) server.

features: **[Getting Started](docs/GETTING_STARTED.md)** — Install, login, agent setup, and migration from another NotebookLM MCP
**[MCP Guide](docs/MCP_GUIDE.md)** — All 35 MCP tools with examples
**[Remote MCP](docs/REMOTE_MCP.md)** — Web/mobile connector feasibility, security, and authentication limitations
**[API Reference](docs/API_REFERENCE.md)** — Internal API docs for contributors

detalle.name: notebooklm-mcp-cli
